'''鈭歸-v-zh-t''' ('''kawavzhetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outbark|outbark]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-v-zh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outbark|outbark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-v-zh-t
|-
! Lemma
| kawavzhetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwavzhetoko|thiwavzhetoko]] || [[word:jiwavzhetoko|jiwavzhetoko]] || [[word:shiwavzhetoko|shiwavzhetoko]] || [[word:kiwavzhetoko|kiwavzhetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
